title: cheiranthus junceus
intro: Cheiranthus junceus, also known as the blue forget-me-not or cornflower, is an annual flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antitussive properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Cheiranthus junceus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Cheiranthus junceus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers in hot water or alcohol to create a medicinal tea or liquid extract.
